title: Creation of trust funds prohibited
doc_html:
§420.  Creation of trust funds prohibited

No trust fund authorized by this Subpart may be established to operate in this state after twelve noon on October 1, 2010.

Acts 2010, No. 415, §1, eff. June 21, 2010.
doc_text:
§420.  Creation of trust funds prohibited
No trust fund authorized by this Subpart may be established to operate in this state after twelve noon on October 1, 2010.
Acts 2010, No. 415, §1, eff. June 21, 2010.
